name: InEight Capital Project Controls API
what_it_does: InEight capital project controls REST API for integrated project planning, cost control, field execution, and document management on large infrastructure and industrial projects. Enables AI agents to manage project budget and cost forecast for earned value management automation, handle schedule creation and progress update for CPM scheduling workflow automation, access field productivity tracking and daily work packaging for construction operations management, retrieve change order and contract variation management for change control automation, manage risk register and risk score tracking for project risk automation, handle document management and RFI workflow for project communication automation, access workforce and resource planning for labor and equipment allocation automation, retrieve daily report and field journal capture for project log automation, manage subcontractor progress and payment certification for subcontract management automation, and integrate InEight with Primavera P6, ERP systems (SAP, Oracle), and enterprise project portfolio management platforms.
use_cases: Tracking project cost performance from EVM monitoring agents
Managing schedule updates from project controls agents
Processing field progress from construction operations agents
Automating change orders from contract management agents
not_for: Small residential construction (use Buildertrend or CoConstruct)
Enterprise ERP (use SAP or Oracle Fusion for financial consolidation)
Simple project management without capital project scale
best_when: A large contractor, owner organization, or project management firm wanting AI agents to automate earned value tracking, schedule management, field productivity reporting, change control, and risk management on major capital infrastructure projects.
avoid_when: EARNED VALUE BASELINE INTEGRITY: Automated EVM data from InEight requires approved performance measurement baseline; automated EVM reporting using unapproved or revised baseline without change control creates DCAA audit and contract compliance issues on government projects. LUMP SUM SCHEDULE OF VALUES ACCURACY: Automated payment certification based on InEight schedule of values completion percentages must be validated by field superintendent or project manager; automated payment on field-reported completion without verification creates overbilling and lien exposure. CHANGE ORDER AUTHORIZATION WORKFLOW: Automated change order creation and pricing must route through contract-defined approval hierarchy before owner submission; automated CO submission without proper internal authorization creates contract and bonding exposure. SAFETY INCIDENT INTEGRATION: Automated integration of safety incident data from InEight field journals into OSHA reporting must be validated for completeness; automated OSHA 300 log entries from field journal data without safety manager review create OSHA recordable misclassification risk.

auth.notes: InEight uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Scottsdale, Arizona HQ. Founded 2012 (spun out from Komatsu). Komatsu Ltd. (TYO: 6301) parent company. Enterprise project controls for mega-projects: oil & gas, power, transportation, water, industrial. $1B+ projects supported. EVM, scheduling, field execution, document management integrated suite. Competes with Oracle Primavera Cloud, ARES PRISM, and Kahua for capital project controls.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise module subscription per project or enterprise license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription by module (Plan, Cost, Field, Document); project-based or enterprise licensing
pricing.notes: Scottsdale AZ. Komatsu Ltd. (TYO:6301) subsidiary. Founded 2012. Mega-project capital controls: oil & gas, power, infrastructure. Per-module or enterprise annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; batch endpoints for bulk schedule and cost data retrieval

known_agent_gotchas: EARNED VALUE BASELINE CHANGE CONTROL: Automated EVM performance data from InEight must be tied to approved performance measurement baseline; automated EVM reporting using revised budgets without formal baseline change control creates DCAA audit findings on government cost-reimbursable contracts; implement baseline version control in automated EVM data retrieval

SCHEDULE LOGIC INTEGRITY IN AUTOMATED UPDATES: Automated schedule progress updates via InEight API must preserve CPM logic ties and critical path integrity; automated percent-complete updates without scheduler review can produce schedule network logic violations; require scheduler validation for critical path activity automated updates

Primavera P6 bidirectional sync conflict resolution — InEight integrates with Oracle Primavera P6 for schedule management; automated bidirectional sync between InEight and P6 can create schedule data conflicts on concurrent edits; implement master-of-record designation and conflict detection before automated sync

Change order approval hierarchy automation — automated CO creation and pricing must route through owner-defined approval hierarchy before automated submission to owner; automated CO bypass of internal authorization creates contract breach and surety bond exposure on construction contracts

Field productivity data quality and validation — InEight field execution daily quantities are field-foreman-entered and subject to overstatement; automated EVM percent-complete derived from field quantities without engineering validation creates overbilled earned value and unrealistic schedule performance

Komatsu parent company roadmap influence — InEight is a Komatsu subsidiary; product roadmap may be influenced by Komatsu's focus on heavy equipment IoT integration; verify API investment and cloud-first roadmap for pure software project controls use cases
agent_readiness.security_notes: Capital project controls. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Project cost, schedule, and field execution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Capital project controls. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Project financial and field execution data.
